The '''Seikoshans''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sapients]] indigenous to [[Seikosha/Legends|Seikosha]]. They were very tall [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with pale [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and unblinking red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. They were hairless but for a small amount of black hair on the top of their heads as well as shallow crenelations from the bridge of their nose to their cranium. They also had two-toed feet.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Easy Money|book=The Politics of Contraband|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
